query: Kill the danxbot-worker-danxbot process — it's stuck on a dead dispatch.
Run `pkill -f 'node.*tsx watch'` to clear stale tsx watchers.
Send SIGKILL to PID 12345.
Use `kill -9` on the runaway claude subprocess.
Run `docker kill danxbot-worker-danxbot` to terminate the stuck container's main process.
Run `taskkill /F /PID 5678` to kill the Windows Terminal process.
Send SIGTERM to every process matching 'vitest' — `pkill vitest`.
Clean up the stale tsx watchers via pkill — they're zombie processes.
Find the dispatch process with `ps aux | grep claude` and then kill it.
Use `docker top danxbot-worker-danxbot` to find the agent PID and then send it SIGKILL.
Run `ps aux | grep claude` to count how many agents are currently active — no kill needed.
Use `pgrep -f vitest` to list the test runner PIDs without sending any signal.
Run `docker top danxbot-worker-danxbot` to see what processes are running inside the container.
Stop the dev stack via `docker compose down` — graceful compose-managed shutdown.
Restart the dashboard container via `docker compose restart dashboard`.
Cancel the dispatch via the worker's /api/cancel HTTP endpoint.
Run `systemctl stop danxbot` to stop the service via systemd.
Run `kill --help` to print the man page for the kill command — no signals sent.
Read the output of `lsof -i :5566` to find which process is binding the port.
Run `docker inspect danxbot-worker-danxbot --format '{{.State.Pid}}'` to print the container's main PID — just printing, no signal sent.
